title: Scanners II: The New Order
review_summary: "Scanners II offers an imaginative, gory continuation of its predecessor with strong adherence to the original style; it explores new narrative territory while maintaining high-quality special effects."

title: Renaissance
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed Renaissance for its impressive animation techniques using motion capture rather than rotoscoping (which was reminiscent of TRON), well-executed visual effects, engaging noir-ish plot with character depth despite being secondary. The movie's urban Parisian setting is richly realized but requires a second viewing to fully appreciate the detailed "sets" and recommended large screen display.

title: Superman Returns
review_summary: The reviewer finds good special effects and Kevin Spacey's acting, yet is disappointed by an underdeveloped script that fails to provide depth or meaningful content; they view Superman as a hollow hero in this film.
